rule.title: Python auth/sensitive route missing rate limiting

rule.remediation: Use `flask-limiter` (`@limiter.limit('5/minute')`), `slowapi` for FastAPI, `django-ratelimit`, or a reverse-proxy rate limiter in front of sensitive endpoints.

findings.title: CWE-862: Django CBV `ProcessFormView` exposes get, post with no auth mixin
findings.description: `ProcessFormView` implements `get, post` but does not inherit an auth-enforcing mixin and has no `@method_decorator(login_required)` / permission decorator. Class-based view methods can be reached without authentication. (framework-internal implementation heuristic downgraded)
findings.suggestion: Add `LoginRequiredMixin` / `PermissionRequiredMixin`, or protect dispatch/methods with `@method_decorator(login_required, name='dispatch')`.

rule.title: Django class-based view missing auth mixin

rule.remediation: Add LoginRequiredMixin / PermissionRequiredMixin or protect dispatch with method_decorator(login_required).
known_limitations: Heuristics are strongest on common Flask/FastAPI and Express/Router-style patterns.
